Why selling 'cost saving' doesn't work in cold email:

Saving money requires trust

They have to:
→ Believe you
→ Evaluate current costs
→ Care
→ Want to change

New revenue requires curiosity. That's it.

Curiosity gets replies

openclaw + synta MCP is the most underrated stack in automation right now.

openclaw handles the agent layer — browsing, messaging, task execution.

synta handles the workflow layer — building, deploying, and self-healing n8n automations.

your agent describes what it needs.
it really is that simple to get production working n8n workflows through open claw

synta just dropped openclaw integration.

let that satisfyingly sink in.

openclaw is the fastest growing open source project in history.
250K github stars. more than react. in 60 days.

the problem: it's a security nightmare. exposed instances, malicious skills, API keys leaking

setup takes 2 minutes.

install the mcporter skill in openclaw → connect your synta account → done.

can quite literally copy this link into openclaw and do some authenticating and you done.

I became my own role model and taught myself.
